verse.name: v1
verse.lines: You were broken You bled from You hands and feet Gracious Savior You died for me

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I’m forgiven, this blessed Salvation Thank you Jesus, my invitation

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You are the table of Mercy You are the Feast of Forgiveness Let us sit down and taste the You are Good You are Good

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I am broken I don’t deserve You I am nothing, You are King of Kings

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Lord please help me Lord please help me hear You You are everything Everything

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Holy Lover Faithful Master Amazing Healer King of Kings Jealous Father Heaven’s Keeper Gracious Savior Everything
